reasoning: The market trades at 67.5% on Polymarket currently, reflecting the expected chance that United Russia will have the highest net increase in seats compared to before the election. While the phrasing 'gains the greatest number of seats... compared to before the election' implies a net gain (which could be challenging given ER's existing supermajority of ~324 seats), Polymarket traders believe ER still has the strongest chance of winning according to this metric, possibly because of expanding Duma representation (e.g., from new districts in annexed territories) or expectations that other major parties (like KPRF or LDPR) will also struggle to make significant proportional net gains. The price has trended slightly downward recently from ~75% to 67.5%. We anchor to the current Polymarket price of 67.5% and moderately increase uncertainty for the dummy horizon dates 'N, /, A' as instructed.
